name: Holiday Appetizer Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup chopped ham, cooked or 2/3 cup sausage, cooked and crumbled - or - 2/3 cup pepperoni, diced or bacon cooked and crumbled
3/4 cup thinly sliced green onions and tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour and cracker crumbs. Cut in butter flavor shortening until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal.
3. Sprinkle with water, a tablespoon at a time, mixing with a fork until the crumbs are completely moistened.
4. Press the mixture into the bottom of an ungreased 15 x 10 x 1 inch pan.
5. Prick the crust with a fork.
6. Sprinkle Swiss cheese, ham, onions, parsley, and pimentos evenly over the crust.
7. In a large bowl, beat eggs, whipping cream, half and half, salt, and pepper until well combined.
8. Pour the egg mixture over the filled crust.
9. Bake at 400°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until set. Cool for 5 minutes.
10. Cut into 1 1/2 by 2 inch pieces. Serve warm. Makes 50 appetizers.
